nasb.text: He says to himself, “God has forgotten; He has hidden His face; He will never see it.”

esv.text: He says in his heart, “God has forgotten, he has hidden his face, he will never see it.”

cnv.text: 他心裡說：“　神已經忘記了， 他已經掩面，永遠不看。”

ccb.text: 他们自言自语：“上帝忘记了， 祂掩面不理这些事！”

csbs.text: 他心里说：“神已经忘记了！ 神隐藏了他的脸，永远不看。”
